description: Power Query / M-based data transformation (Dataflow Gen2)

definition_parts.description: Dataflow definition with M queries and transformations

notes: Two job types: 'execute' (runs dataflow) and 'applyChanges' (applies pending definition changes)
Run supports --wait with polling (terminal states: Completed, Failed, Cancelled)
execute-query returns binary Apache Arrow IPC stream (save to --file)
discover-parameters returns M parameters from the dataflow
